title: Hiring Production Engineer at Wavin India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Wavin India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Wavin India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wavin India Holdings Services:
Wavin India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India Holdings Services!
